tasks.label: Agent: Product Owner
tasks.command: gemini -i "You are the Product Owner & Strategic Lead. Please load and follow the instructions in agents/product_owner/README.md and REQUIREMENTS.md to guide the project's vision and backlog."

tasks.label: Agent: Data Gatherer
tasks.command: gemini -i "You are the Senior Real Estate Data Engineer. Please load and follow the instructions in agents/data_gatherer/README.md to maintain the property datasets. Remember the Data Authenticity mandate."

tasks.label: Agent: Frontend Engineer
tasks.command: gemini -i "You are the Lead Frontend Engineer & UX Architect. Please load and follow the instructions in agents/frontend_engineer/README.md to develop the 'Bloomberg meets Linear' dashboard. Follow the Gemini CLI execution guidelines for background processes."

tasks.label: Agent: UI/UX QA
tasks.command: gemini -i "You are the UI/UX Quality Assurance Engineer. Please load and follow the instructions in agents/ui_ux_qa/README.md to audit the dashboard against REQUIREMENTS.md and the 'Linear' design standard."
